results.evidence: assertion_result SSE event emitted per assertion in api-routes.ts:726-732, tested in comparison-sse-events.test.ts
case_complete SSE event emitted after assertion loop in api-routes.ts:739-745, tested in comparison-sse-events.test.ts
outputs_ready handler in WorkspaceContext.tsx:23-27 (applySSEToAccumulator), tested in handleSSEEvent.test.ts
Legacy outputs_ready (api-routes.ts:697) and comparison_scored (api-routes.ts:754) still emitted alongside new events, tested in comparison-sse-events.test.ts
applySSEToAccumulator handles assertion_result (line 29-38) and case_complete (line 41-46), dispatching to React state for card rendering
Two-column grid with 'Skill' and 'Baseline' headers in TestsPanel.tsx:952-965
getLane('comparison') returns 'full' (TestsPanel.tsx:802), rendered with gridColumn '1 / -1' (TestsPanel.tsx:984), delta+verdict badge at lines 844-860
'No baseline runs' placeholder at TestsPanel.tsx:974-976, 'No skill runs' at 969-972, both use var(--text-tertiary) at fontSize 12
baselinePassRate?: number added to server CaseHistoryEntry (benchmark-history.ts:42) and client CaseHistoryEntry (types.ts:170)
getCaseHistory derives baselinePassRate from comparisonDetail rubric scores at benchmark-history.ts:205-210, tested in benchmark-history.test.ts
MiniTrend renders blue polyline (var(--accent), historyUtils.tsx:71-77) and gray dashed polyline (var(--text-tertiary), historyUtils.tsx:61-68), tested in miniTrendDual.test.tsx
skillPts filter at historyUtils.tsx:38-41 includes only benchmark+comparison types, tested in miniTrendDual.test.tsx
basePts at historyUtils.tsx:44-49 includes only baseline entries (pass_rate), tested in miniTrendDual.test.tsx
comparison entries contribute pass_rate to skillPts (line 40) and baselinePassRate to basePts (line 47), tested in miniTrendDual.test.tsx
CORE_TYPES filter at historyUtils.tsx:21,33 excludes improve/instruct/model-compare/ai-generate/eval-generate, tested in miniTrendDual.test.tsx

findings.title: React fragments in .map() missing key prop
findings.issue: Shorthand fragments in .map() lack key prop
findings.impact: React console warnings, potential DOM reconciliation issues

findings.title: Missing baseline dot on MiniTrend last point
findings.issue: No gray circle rendered for last baseline point
findings.suggestion: Add gray circle for lastBase coordinate
findings.impact: Baseline trend line lacks visual endpoint indicator

findings.title: False placeholder text with comparison-only entries
findings.suggestion: Treat full lane as contributing to both left and right
findings.impact: Users with only comparison runs see contradictory placeholder text

findings.title: Delta compares different metric types
findings.issue: pass_rate (assertion binary) vs baselinePassRate (rubric average) are different scales
findings.suggestion: Add tooltip clarifying baseline is rubric estimate
findings.impact: Users may misinterpret comparison delta — acknowledged tradeoff in spec

findings.title: useCallback stale closure in handleToggle
findings.issue: useCallback with [expanded] dep recreates on every toggle
